channel.title: The Red Canoe · Live Dispatches
channel.description: Satellite messages from Violette, Stan and Charlie — La Vérendrye canoe expedition, June 2026.

item.title: Pipeline test #3 — if you get this email, the live dispatch system is working. Each satellite message from the trail will arrive in your inbox like this, as soon as it is sent. · 📍 47.2341, -76.5012
item.description: Pipeline test #3 — if you get this email, the live dispatch system is working. Each satellite message from the trail will arrive in your inbox like this, as soon as it is sent. · 📍 47.2341, -76.5012

item.title: Second test. The canoe is packed, the barrel is sealed, and Charlie has been practicing his bow stance. T-minus 24 days. · 📍 47.2341, -76.5012
item.description: Second test. The canoe is packed, the barrel is sealed, and Charlie has been practicing his bow stance. T-minus 24 days. · 📍 47.2341, -76.5012

item.title: Testing the live dispatch system. If you receive this by email, the satellite pipeline is working. See you on the water June 17. · 📍 47.2341, -76.5012
item.description: Testing the live dispatch system. If you receive this by email, the satellite pipeline is working. See you on the water June 17. · 📍 47.2341, -76.5012
